title: calophyllum lanigerum
intro: Calophyllum lanigerum, also known as the woolly calophyllum or woolly evergreen, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical regions of Australia, New Guinea, and nearby islands. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to the presence of calophyllic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Calophyllum lanigerum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as fever and respiratory infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include extracts, oils, and powders, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
